content.query:
-- Get the number of prospects that have multiple leads

select count([CustomerID]), OperatingCompany
from
(
SELECT count([LeadID]) as LeadCount
,[CustomerID]
,OperatingCompany
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
 group BY
 CustomerID
 ,OperatingCompany
 having count([LeadID]) > 1
) tmp1
group BY
OperatingCompany

-- Get the total number of Prospects

SELECT count(1), [OperatingCompany]
 FROM [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]
 group by [OperatingCompany]

-- Below statements give a sample of prospects that have multiple leads

SELECT top (10) count([LeadID]) as LeadCount
,[CustomerID]
,OperatingCompany
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
 group BY
 CustomerID
 ,OperatingCompany
 having count([LeadID]) > 1



 select * from EDW.FACT_LEAD where CustomerID in 
 (
'FHI-101244'
,'FHI-100520'
)
